It seems to be very old journals written: It seems to be very old journals written by Matthew.
\"MATTHEW: Today is March 26th! My lovel: "MATTHEW: Today is March 26th! My lovely baby daughter was born!
We were trying to figure out a name for: We were trying to figure out a name for her. Chasity wanted to name her Veronica.
I, on the other hand, wanted to name her: I, on the other hand, wanted to name her Hellonearth, but I guess Veronica is fine.
My old buddy from Middle School, Jenner,: My old buddy from Middle School, Jenner, came over to see Veronica.
Jenner was so not meant for kids. He cou: Jenner was so not meant for kids. He couldn't even hold Veronica properly!
Eventually both of them ended up bawling: Eventually both of them ended up bawling like babies, though, I think Jenner was louder.
I heard Tesla just had a baby a few week: I heard Tesla just had a baby a few weeks ago. Maybe we should have some sort of party?"
\"MATTHEW: Veronica turned 5 today! It's: "MATTHEW: Veronica turned 5 today!  It's been 5 long years of crying and screaming!
Well, she better get in line because I'v: Well, she better get in line because I've been crying and screaming for 32 years.
Amber and Veronica get along pretty well: Amber and Veronica get along pretty well. Though, I think Tesla's spoiling Amber.
I know she hasn't exactly had the time o: I know she hasn't exactly had the time of her life, but spoiling Amber may... uh... complicate things.
On another note, I heard that Blakeory C: On another note, I heard that Blakeory Co. is sending their branch to Gearen City!
Mr. Blakeory is sending his granddaughte: Mr. Blakeory is sending his granddaughter to live in Gearen City. I think her name was Saki.
Hopefully Amber and Veronica will get al: Hopefully Amber and Veronica will get along well with her. They could use some balance in their friendship."
\"MATTHEW: Veronica is going to turn 7 i: "MATTHEW: Veronica is going to turn 7 in a few days.
Tesla told me that we should throw somet: Tesla told me that we should throw something for her. I'm sure Saki and Amber would like it as well.
I know Veronica has been really into mus: I know Veronica has been really into music lately, and I think I'm to blame for that...
Maybe Chasity and I could get out our ol: Maybe Chasity and I could get out our old band equipment and let Veronica and her friends use it?
Maddie told me that this was a terrible: Maddie told me that this was a terrible idea, and Cas told me they'd just break it.
Eh, maybe they're right, but I think the: Eh, maybe they're right, but I think the memory of my daughter being happy pays the price for broken equipment."
During Veronica's play session, our equi: During Veronica's play session, our equipment mysteriously caught fire.
We tried to put it out, but this fire wa: We tried to put it out, but this fire was something I've never seen before.
The children were terrified, but I was a: The children were terrified, but I was able to get them out quickly.
Unfortunately, by the time we all got th: Unfortunately, by the time we all got them out, the whole building was ablaze.
The fire was so dangerous, so fast, so d: The fire was so dangerous, so fast, so destructive... It spread to other buildings in the vicinity.
Never in my life have I seen a fire of t: Never in my life have I seen a fire of this magnitude. It almost felt unnatural.
While I got my family, and my friends ou: While I got my family, and my friends out of the city, I noticed something in the corner of my eye.
The lab was completely on fire. Jenner,: The lab was completely on fire. Jenner, Maddie and Cas were still in there...
I have no idea how things got this bad t: I have no idea how things got this bad this fast, but I don't... I don't know...
\"MATTHEW: The result of the fire was ab: "MATTHEW: The result of the fire was absolutely catastrophic.
Half of Gearen City had burned down. Man: Half of Gearen City had burned down.  Many lives were lost.
I haven't heard from Jenner and the rest: I haven't heard from Jenner and the rest in days. I'm fearing they did not make it.
The city council found the origin of the: The city council found the origin of the fire, and they're deciding on what to do with us.
Tesla, Chasity and myself are all in a s: Tesla, Chasity and myself are all in a state of panic, but I think I must make a difficult decision.
I decided that I'd take the blame for th: I decided that I'd take the blame for the fire, and that I would take full punishment.
That was the plan... but it seems like t: That was the plan... but it seems like they found something that belonged to Amber.
It was a small metal box filled with pic: It was a small metal box filled with pictures and movies from the party.
For some odd and unexplainable reason, t: For some odd and unexplainable reason, the box was completely untouched.
It had survived the extremely high temps: It had survived the extremely high temps and the debris from the room collapsing.
Nevertheless, it belonged to Amber and s: Nevertheless, it belonged to Amber and so she was blamed for the incident along with myself.
We were both asked to leave the city ind: We were both asked to leave the city indefinitely.
They told a 7 year old girl that they we: They told a 7 year old girl that they were no longer allowed to stay here anymore.
The whole council agreed to these terms.
We thought it'd be best for the kids if: We thought it'd be best for the kids if we separated them after this traumatic event.
Saki went to go live in West Gearen City: Saki went to go live in West Gearen City with her folks.
Tesla took Amber to live on Terajuma Isl: Tesla took Amber to live on Terajuma Island. Veronica stayed with Chasity in East Gearen City.
As for myself...? Well, I don't know whe: As for myself...? Well, I don't know where I'm going, but I must go.
I don't want to pull Veronica away from: I don't want to pull Veronica away from her home... Not because of me.
If I was able to save her future by tarn: If I was able to save her future by tarnishing mine... I think... I think that was the best case scenario.
I love both of them so much.
I hope Veronica won't hate me the next t: I hope Veronica won't hate me the next time I see her.
\"MATTHEW: Been a few years since I've w: "MATTHEW: Been a few years since I've written in this thing!
Everything has been so different since t: Everything has been so different since that day, but life moves on.
Veronica turned 12 the other day. I wrot: Veronica turned 12 the other day. I wrote her a letter. I hope she doesn't rip it up.
Something I never mentioned was that Jen: Something I never mentioned was that Jenner and the rest were a-okay!
Jenner told me that they left early that: Jenner told me that they left early that day, but his voice didn't sound so sure.
Whatever, hearing my best bro's voice wa: Whatever, hearing my best bro's voice was all I could ever hope for.
Jenner even has a daughter now apparentl: Jenner even has a daughter now apparently! I think her name was Melia or something.
Jenner told me Melia was about 9... or 1: Jenner told me Melia was about 9... or 10.
Obviously, Melia's adopted, but she look: Obviously, Melia's adopted, but she looks so much like Jenner anyway.
Chasity told me that they refrained from: Chasity told me that they refrained from telling the children that she's adopted for their own personal reasons.
I guess Jenner felt lonely after his onl: I guess Jenner felt lonely after his only friend moved away from him.
I mean, that's the reason I'm assuming h: I mean, that's the reason I'm assuming he adopted Melia.
As for Tesla and Amber, I heard Tesla op: As for Tesla and Amber, I heard Tesla opened up her very own Resort in Teila Town!
Teila Town was this really boring town w: Teila Town was this really boring town with a low population anyway.
Maybe I'll go visit her and Amber someda: Maybe I'll go visit her and Amber someday, or maybe that might be too awkward.
Anyway, I think this'll be my last journ: Anyway, I think this'll be my last journal entry.
So to you snooping through my journal, I: So to you snooping through my journal, I'll bid you a good day!"
\"MATTHEW: On my journey to find a new h: "MATTHEW: On my journey to find a new home, it seems that I've come across uncharted territory!
Since no one knows this place is here, t: Since no one knows this place is here, to my knowledge, this will be a suitable place to live out my days.
I don't have a name for this place yet,: I don't have a name for this place yet, but it actually reminds me of that place Jenner and I found behind Sheridan.
If I remember correctly, that place was: If I remember correctly, that place was uncharted territory as well.
We named that place Cozy Covey, but I ca: We named that place Cozy Covey, but I can already hear my wife Chasity sighing.
So I think I'm going to go for a more se: So I think I'm going to go for a more serious name...
But for now, I'll just name it Cozey Hom: But for now, I'll just name it Cozey Homey. Cozy with an e because I said so!"
\"MATTHEW: So I actually revisited Cozy: "MATTHEW: So I actually revisited Cozy Covey a few weeks ago, and the geographical similarities are uncanny.
I find it very hard to believe that thes: I find it very hard to believe that these two places aren't connected at all.
I'm inclined to believe that these two p: I'm inclined to believe that these two places are pieces of one whole area.
I drew out the layout of each, and it lo: I drew out the layout of each, and it looks like there used to be an estuary present in Cozy Covey.
It would flow out into an actual river a: It would flow out into an actual river and it would go all the way down here to Cozey Homey.
And because of that, I think I'm going t: And because of that, I think I'm going to name this place River's End.
A suitable name, right? This used to be: A suitable name, right? This used to be the end of a river. River's End?
Right! Well, I'm glad we go that settled: Right! Well, I'm glad we go that settled! That's all I'm going write here.
